procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1497.001
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1497.001 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

sigma.title: System Information Discovery Via Sysctl - MacOS
HTTP Request With Empty User Agent

osquery.name: t1497_001_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1497_001_file_mod
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1497_001_sys_info
osquery.query_text: SELECT hostname, cpu_type, physical_memory, hardware_vendor, hardware_model FROM system_info;

osquery_matches.name: t1497_001_proc_hidden
osquery_matches.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery_matches.name: t1497_001_sys_info
osquery_matches.query_text: SELECT hostname, cpu_type, physical_memory, hardware_vendor, hardware_model FROM system_info;
